remarks: Now offering 1 MONTH FREE with a one-year lease a significant savings opportunity on an already exceptional value. Brand-new top-floor residence featuring stunning views and 1,525 sq. ft. of beautifully designed, one-level living. This spacious 3-bedroom, 2 bath apartment offers modern finishes and a thoughtful layout designed for today's lifestyle. This expansive residence at The Wilton Center Lofts offers a unique opportunity for elevated, contemporary living, featuring a HUGE private deck accessible from both the primary bedroom and main living spaces. Excellent commuter location-just a seven-minute walk to the Metro-North train and a three-minute drive. This thoughtfully designed home was architecturally and interior designed by the award-winning Granoff Architects, showcasing top-tier finishes and timeless style throughout. The apartment boasts 9-foot ceilings and oversized, light-filled windows, creating a bright and open atmosphere. The gourmet kitchen is equipped with quartz countertops, stainless steel BOSCH appliances, custom cabinetry, and premium fixtures. Wood-grain flooring flows throughout the home, complementing the luxurious bathrooms. Large walk-in closets and an in-unit washer and dryer provide everyday comfort and convenience. Residents enjoy access to a fitness center, tenant lounge, covered parking, and available storage units, further enhancing the lifestyle experience. Furry friends are welcome.
